hero.subtitle: A desktop workflow for TikTok creators — intelligent post-production, cleaner dialogue, localization, and effects in one place.
hero.logoAlt: TikTok Video Cut Pro app icon

featuresSection.label: Features
featuresSection.title: Everything you need after you hit record
featuresSection.subtitle: Four pillars to publish quicker, polish dialogue, and reach Vietnamese and global audiences with confidence.

features.title: Smart-Edit pipeline
features.description: Automate baseline edits like trims and shot duplication from a single master cut so you can spin distribution-ready variants while keeping each upload feeling fresh and authentic.

features.title: Speech-aware cleanup
features.description: Detect fillers and awkward takes so you can remove dead air and mistakes — tighter pacing, more professional delivery, and stronger retention.

features.title: Translation & global-ready localization
features.description: Grow abroad or repurpose international footage (for example foreign-language product reviews).
bullets: Smart subtitles: translate captions into Vietnamese or your target language.
AI dubbing: natural Vietnamese reads tuned for local listening habits.

features.title: Filters & creative effects library
features.description: Hundreds of filters and motion treatments to differentiate your visuals and stand out in crowded vertical feeds.

downloadSection.label: Download app
downloadSection.title: Pick the build for your machine
downloadSection.subtitle: Version {version} — installers are served from GitHub Releases (tap a card to download).
